creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Due to the currently used processes for automated package building, the 
distfiles for NO_PACKAGE ports will not automatically appear on FreeBSD.org ftp 
mirrors, because the distfile harvesting is a by-product of package building on 
Pointyhat, from which these ports are removed by mentioned NO_PACKAGE flag. 

OTOH there is nothing preventing interested parties with sufficient access 
privileges from manually injecting these distfiles into ftp-master. Thus, the 
documentation is consistent with the spirit, and needs not to be changed.
